name: Roblox
description: Roblox app integration for agent-driven gameplay and interactive experiences.

ROBLOX_API_KEY.label: Api Key
ROBLOX_API_KEY.help: API key for authenticating with the Roblox Open Cloud API.

ROBLOX_DRY_RUN.label: Dry Run
ROBLOX_DRY_RUN.help: When true, operations are simulated but not executed.

ROBLOX_PLACE_ID.label: Place Id
ROBLOX_PLACE_ID.help: The Place ID of the specific Roblox place within the universe.

ROBLOX_UNIVERSE_ID.label: Universe Id
ROBLOX_UNIVERSE_ID.help: The Universe ID of the Roblox experience to interact with.

ROBLOX_POLL_INTERVAL.label: Poll Interval
ROBLOX_POLL_INTERVAL.help: Polling interval in seconds for Roblox data store operations.

ROBLOX_WEBHOOK_SECRET.label: Webhook Secret
ROBLOX_WEBHOOK_SECRET.help: Secret key for validating incoming webhooks from Roblox.

ROBLOX_MESSAGING_TOPIC.label: Messaging Topic
ROBLOX_MESSAGING_TOPIC.help: The messaging service topic for cross-server communication.
